summary: Comprehensive testing of billing lifecycle for P0 stabilization. Fixed critical bug: stale Stripe customer reference causing 500 errors on change-plan. All billing endpoints tested for legacy subscription state. UI flows verified working.

issues: Warning banner 'Limitinize yaklaşıyorsunuz' shows at top - verify this is expected behavior for usage limits

passed_tests: GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns legacy_subscription=true, managed_subscription=false for agent@acenta.test
GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns valid plan (starter)
GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns Turkish interval_label (Aylık)
GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns ISO date format for next_renewal_at (2026-04-08T19:13:16+00:00)
GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns correct guardrails: can_cancel=false, change_flow=checkout_redirect
GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns legacy_notice with correct Turkish message
GET /api/billing/subscription - Returns portal_available=true
POST /api/billing/cancel-subscription - Returns 409 subscription_management_unavailable for legacy
POST /api/billing/reactivate-subscription - Returns 409 subscription_management_unavailable for legacy
POST /api/billing/customer-portal - Returns valid Stripe billing portal URL (billing.stripe.com/...)
POST /api/billing/change-plan (pro/monthly) - Returns checkout_redirect with valid Stripe checkout URL
POST /api/billing/change-plan - Handles stale customer reference gracefully (no 500)
POST /api/billing/change-plan (enterprise) - Returns 422 enterprise_contact_required
POST /api/billing/create-checkout - Returns valid checkout session with correct pricing (TRY 2490)
Frontend billing page loads with Turkish title 'Faturalama'
Frontend shows summary cards: Mevcut Plan (Starter), Sonraki Yenileme (08 Nisan 2026), Faturalama Durumu (Aylık · Aktif)
Frontend legacy notice displays correct Turkish message
Frontend cancel button disabled for legacy subscription
Frontend payment update button enabled (portal available)
Frontend plan change button redirects to Stripe checkout with correct pricing (TRY 2,490.00/month for Pro)
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: create_checkout_session now handles 'No such customer' errors by clearing stale reference and retrying with customer_email
The account agent@acenta.test has legacy_subscription=true because provider_subscription_id is null
Legacy guardrails working correctly: can_cancel=false, change_flow=checkout_redirect
Customer portal creates new customer if old one is stale - working correctly
Turkish date format working: shows '08 Nisan 2026' in UI
Rate limiting on login works (429 after multiple attempts) - this is expected security behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: agent@acenta.test is now in legacy subscription state. The previous iteration showed managed_subscription=true but Stripe subscription/customer were deleted, leaving stale references. FIX APPLIED: stripe_checkout_service.create_checkout_session now handles 'No such customer' errors by clearing stale reference and using customer_email. Account provider_customer_id updated to cus_U7DIaAlepXWMQR (new customer). To test managed subscription flows (cancel/reactivate), need to complete a checkout session to create real Stripe subscription.

fix_applied.issue: Stale customer ID (deleted in Stripe) caused 'No such customer' error (500) when creating checkout session
fix_applied.fix: Added try/except block to catch InvalidRequestError with 'No such customer', clear stale reference via _clear_stale_customer_reference(), and retry with customer_email instead
fix_applied.impact: Change-plan flow now works for accounts with stale/deleted Stripe customer references

feature_validation_summary.GET /api/billing/subscription: PASS - Returns full billing overview with correct legacy state
feature_validation_summary.POST /api/billing/customer-portal: PASS - Returns Stripe billing portal URL
feature_validation_summary.POST /api/billing/change-plan: PASS - Returns checkout_redirect for legacy accounts
feature_validation_summary.POST /api/billing/create-checkout: PASS - Creates Stripe checkout session with correct pricing
feature_validation_summary.Frontend billing page: PASS - All elements render correctly with Turkish localization
feature_validation_summary.Legacy notice: PASS - Shows correct Turkish message about self-service activation
